title: Goodyear Wheel Master Wrench Perfect for Removing and Fitting Wheel Nuts| Strong and Durable| Extends to 530mm| Complete with Sockets for 21-23mm and 17-19mm|Extra Long Handle Increases Torque
features: Perfect for removing and fitting wheel nuts.
Extra long handle increases torque, which helps remove difficult wheel nuts easily.
description: From the manufacturer GOODYEAR products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations All GOODYEAR products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide Strong and durable. Extends to 530mm. Perfect for removing and fitting wheel nuts. Extra long handle increases torque, which helps remove difficult wheel nuts easily. complete with sockets for 21-23mm and 17-19mm. GOODYEAR Wheel Master Wrench
